summary: Poor performance due to guest saxophonist Clarence Clemons ruining the second set; recording quality unknown
review: The sole reviewer lambastes the concert, saying that guest saxophonist Clarence Clemons was a hack and completely ruined the second set. No information is provided about the audio source or its fidelity, leaving the recording quality indeterminate.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief, highly negative review (0 stars) mentioning a major performance issue and no details on sound quality; therefore the overall rating is very low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer feels the second‑set flow was destroyed by the guest saxophone performance.
